MOTION TO STRIKE ANSWER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jul-10-2014 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Judge: Lillian K. Sing; Clerk: Jose Rios Merida; Reporter: Not reported. (D501)

Appearances:
Charlie W. Yu, Esq. of Hedani Choy Spalding et al (415-778-0800), counsel for plaintiff/moving party
No appearance by defendant(s)

The Court Adopts the Tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF SEAN MARTIN's MOTION TO STRIKE ANSWER TO COMPLAINT is GRANTED. No opposition filed. Defendant shall have 10 days from the notice of entry of order to file an amended answer in conformity with CCP 431.30(d). A written order is signed and filed.
